requirement_topic.zh: 进口商关联准入与入境口岸
requirement_topic.zht: 進口商關聯准入與入境港口

summary.en: Thailand-facing power-tool entry is normally executed through an in-country importer or local licence-holder. Market placement documentation should tie product model scope, warranty and recall responsibilities, and release ownership to the local responsible party. Major entry nodes for logistics planning include Laem Chabang and Bangkok channels.
summary.zh: 泰国市场进入通常由泰国在地进口商或持牌主体执行。市场放行文件应将型号范围、保修与召回责任、放行归属与本地责任主体绑定。物流规划中的主要口岸包括廊曼巴蓬（Laem Chabang）与曼谷。
summary.zht: 泰國市場進入通常由泰國在地進口商或持牌主體執行。市場放行文件應將型號範圍、保固與召回責任、放行歸屬與本地責任主體綁定。物流規劃中的主要口岸包括拉雍巴蓬（Laem Chabang）與曼谷。

standards_or_laws: TISI-related importer-linked market placement flow for controlled in-scope electrical products
Thai customs documentation and local accountability chain linked to the local importer or license-holder
Laem Chabang and Bangkok as practical customs and clearance channels

summary.en: Chinese export files typically route through manufacturer or buyer-side customs workflows and do not automatically provide the Thailand in-country importer/holder structure for post-entry accountability.
summary.zh: 中国出口资料通常按制造商或买方口岸流程管理，通常不能自动提供泰国入境所需的在地进口商/持牌人管理结构。
summary.zht: 中國出口資料通常按製造商或買方口岸流程管理，通常不能自動提供泰國入境所需的在地進口商／持牌人管理結構。

standards_or_laws: China domestic and buyer logistics workflows
CN exporter shipping documents and customs release files

gap.en: The core gap is legal-channel ownership. A technically compliant tool may still be blocked at Thai release if importer-linked accountability and release documentation are not pre-aligned to Laem Chabang or Bangkok channel requirements.
gap.zh: 核心差距是法律链路归属。即使技术参数合规，若未在泰国入境渠道（如廊曼巴蓬或曼谷）前置完成进口商责任与放行文件对接，也可能被阻拦。
gap.zht: 核心差距是法律鏈路歸屬。即使技術參數合規，若未在泰國入境渠道（如拉雍巴蓬或曼谷）前置完成進口商責任與放行文件對接，也可能被阻擋。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory practical precondition for Thailand market release through local importer-linked channels and port-aware release planning.
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese manufacturer-driven release records are not equivalent to Thailand importer or license-holder accountability in the Thai channel.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Thailand-ready until import-channel ownership and Laem Chabang/Bangkok release responsibilities are explicitly documented for each shipping model.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在未按型号明确进出口通道归属与廊曼巴蓬/曼谷放行责任前，不应视为泰国就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在未按型號明確進口通道歸屬與拉雍巴蓬／曼谷放行責任前，不應視為泰國就緒。
